parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT_SCHEMA="$ROOT/specs/tenant_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
JOB_SCHEMA="$ROOT/specs/job_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
missing=""
for f in "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"; do
  if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
    if [ -n "$missing" ]; then missing="$missing, "; fi
    missing="$missing$f"
  fi
done
if [ -n "$missing" ]; then
  echo "{\"status\":\"hard_failure\",\"code\":\"missing_input_schemas\",\"message\":\"Required schema files are missing\",\"missing\":\"$missing\"}"
  exit 1
fi
node -e "const fs=require('fs');JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'));JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[2],'utf8'));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'ok',tenant_schema:process.argv[1],job_schema:process.argv[2]}));" "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const out = $node['Assert Shared Schemas'].json.stdout || '{}'; let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(out); } catch (e) { parsed = { status: 'hard_failure', code: 'invalid_schema_files', message: out || 'schema parse failed' }; } return { status: 'hard_failure', reason: 'missing_or_invalid_schemas', code: parsed.code || 'invalid_schema_files', details: parsed }; })() }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
JOB_TYPE="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.job_type}}"
JOB_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.job_id}}"
if [ -z "$JOB_ID" ]; then JOB_ID="mkt_publish_${TENANT_ID}_$(date +%s)"; fi
PROD="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.production_outputs_json}}"
TARGETS="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.publish_targets_json}}"
DRY_RUN="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.dry_run}}"
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
OUT_DIR="$ROOT/generated/draft/marketing-publish"
RESULT_PATH="$OUT_DIR/${JOB_ID}.publish-result.json"
STATE_PATH="$OUT_DIR/${JOB_ID}.job-runtime.json"
mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=process.argv;const tenantId=p[1],jobType=p[2],jobId=p[3],prodRaw=p[4],targetsRaw=p[5],dryRaw=p[6],now=p[7],resultPath=p[8],statePath=p[9];const stageHistory=[];const push=(stage,status,note,extra={})=>stageHistory.push({at:new Date().toISOString(),stage,status,note,...extra});push('queued','pending','marketing publish workflow accepted job');push('validating_inputs','running','validating production outputs and targets');let productionOutputs={};try{productionOutputs=JSON.parse(prodRaw||'{}')}catch(e){const fail={status:'failed',reason:'invalid_input',code:'invalid_production_outputs_json',details:{message:String(e)}};fs.writeFileSync(resultPath,JSON.stringify(fail,null,2));push('publish_completed','failed','invalid production outputs json');const runtime={schema_name:'job_runtime_state_schema',schema_version:'1.0.0',job_id:jobId,job_type:jobType,tenant_id:tenantId,state:'publish_completed',status:'failed',attempt:1,max_attempts:3,history:stageHistory,created_at:now,updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),results_path:resultPath};fs.writeFileSync(statePath,JSON.stringify(runtime,null,2));console.log(JSON.stringify({status:'failed',tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,publish_state:'failed',results_path:resultPath,state_path:statePath,error:fail}));process.exit(2)}const discovered=Object.values(productionOutputs||{}).filter(v=>typeof v==='string');const existing=discovered.filter(p=>{try{return fs.existsSync(p)}catch{return false}});if(existing.length===0){const fail={status:'failed',reason:'missing_production_outputs',code:'no_existing_artifacts',details:{provided_paths:discovered}};fs.writeFileSync(resultPath,JSON.stringify(fail,null,2));push('publish_completed','failed','no production outputs found on disk');const runtime={schema_name:'job_runtime_state_schema',schema_version:'1.0.0',job_id:jobId,job_type:jobType,tenant_id:tenantId,state:'publish_completed',status:'failed',attempt:1,max_attempts:3,history:stageHistory,created_at:now,updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),results_path:resultPath};fs.writeFileSync(statePath,JSON.stringify(runtime,null,2));console.log(JSON.stringify({status:'failed',tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,publish_state:'failed',results_path:resultPath,state_path:statePath,error:fail}));process.exit(3)}let targets=[];try{targets=JSON.parse(targetsRaw||'[]')}catch{targets=[]}if(!Array.isArray(targets)) targets=[];const allowed=['meta_ads'];let repaired=false;targets=targets.filter(t=>typeof t==='string'&&allowed.includes(t));if(targets.length===0){targets=['meta_ads'];repaired=true;}push('publishing','running','publishing with safe defaults',{targets,repaired_targets:repaired,dry_run:(dryRaw==='true'||dryRaw===true)});const maxAttempts=3;const attempts=[];for(let i=1;i<=maxAttempts;i++){attempts.push({attempt:i,stage:'publish',target_results:targets.map(t=>({target:t,status:'paused',activated:false,dry_run:(dryRaw==='true'||dryRaw===true)})),repair_applied:i===1&&repaired});break;}const result={status:'completed',publish_state:'publish_completed',tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,safe_defaults:{paused:true,activate_after_publish:false,dry_run_default:true},targets,bounded_repair:{enabled:true,max_attempts:maxAttempts,repaired_targets:repaired},consumed_production_outputs:existing,attempts,created_at:now,updated_at:new Date().toISOString()};fs.writeFileSync(resultPath,JSON.stringify(result,null,2));push('publish_completed','completed','structured publish results saved',{results_path:resultPath});const runtime={schema_name:'job_runtime_state_schema',schema_version:'1.0.0',job_id:jobId,job_type:jobType,tenant_id:tenantId,state:'publish_completed',status:'completed',attempt:1,max_attempts:maxAttempts,history:stageHistory,created_at:now,updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),results_path:resultPath};fs.writeFileSync(statePath,JSON.stringify(runtime,null,2));console.log(JSON.stringify({status:'completed',tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,publish_state:'publish_completed',results_path:resultPath,state_path:statePath,targets,bounded_repair:{enabled:true,max_attempts:maxAttempts,repaired_targets:repaired}}));" "$TENANT_ID" "$JOB_TYPE" "$JOB_ID" "$PROD" "$TARGETS" "$DRY_RUN" "$NOW" "$RESULT_PATH" "$STATE_PATH"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const out = $node['Run Marketing Publish'].json.stdout || '{}'; let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(out); } catch (e) { parsed = { status: 'failed', reason: 'publish_execution_failed', code: 'invalid_publish_output', details: { output: out } }; } return parsed; })() }}
